seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Zakkie Bester - Marinda Kook

html:
It is good to have a good neighbour in life, but it is even better to have a good wine man as a friend.

This week I’m cooking with my winemaker friend Zakkie Bester. He was at Riebeek Cellars for a long time, but after his retirement he now makes Bester Wines. I asked him to please make enough so that we won’t have a shortage at the retirement home when we get there. I promised him I’ll be the baker if he’ll be the pourer.

Zakkie and I both have the West Coast in our blood. So how else but to make a smoorvis together. The meal was rounded off nicely with apple crumble and good Bester wine!

Tune in on Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147.
